name: codexai-agentic-workflow
description: Spec-first, quality-gated Codex workflow pack for full-cycle agentic development.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-first development, project memory, runtime routing, and quality gates for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex workflow plugin that routes requests through project profile, context, specs, role docs, planning, implementation, verification, and handoff.
defaultPrompt: Turn this request into a spec-first implementation plan.
Run CodexAI preflight and recommend the right workflow.
Verify this change with the CodexAI quality gate.

auth.credentialPolicy: Never commit tokens; use GitHub CLI credential storage or environment-provided tokens.
